overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Batman: Arkham Knight showing Batman walking along elevated industrial walkways at night. The scene transitions from a covered glass-enclosed bridge to an open-air bridge overlooking a stormy harbor with industrial cranes and city lights in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered elevated walkway with glass ceiling

agents.ego_description: Batman walking steadily along the covered elevated walkway, cape flowing behind him with each step

entered.detail: glass-paneled roof structure covering the elevated walkway with illuminated panels
grated metal walkway suspended high above the city with railings on sides
tall metal tower structure supporting the elevated walkway cables
dark water visible far below the walkway reflecting city lights
red and white warning sign attached to the walkway railing

segments.scene_description: Batman walks along a covered elevated industrial walkway with a glass-paneled roof overhead. The metal grating walkway extends forward with support towers visible in the distance to the left and a body of water far below to the right. The area is artificially lit by overhead panels, creating a sheltered environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open elevated bridge overlooking industrial harbor

events.description: exits the covered glass walkway into open air, revealing the industrial harbor and cranes
walkway curves slightly right offering clearer view of harbor cranes and loading facilities

agents.ego_description: Batman continues walking along the open elevated bridge, approaching the industrial crane structures with cape billowing in the open air

entered.detail: large industrial cranes and loading equipment at the harbor facility
industrial dock buildings with illuminated windows and loading docks
dark storm clouds visible overhead now that the roof has ended

segments.scene_description: Batman emerges from the covered walkway into open air on an elevated bridge overlooking a vast industrial harbor. Large cranes and dock facilities become visible in the distance against a stormy night sky. The walkway continues forward, now exposed to the elements, with the city skyline visible on the left and the harbor extending to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Batman progresses from a sheltered industrial corridor into an expansive, open-air harbor landscape. It begins with Batman walking along a metal grating walkway beneath a glass-paneled roof, where artificial overhead lighting creates a confined and protected environment. As he moves forward, the camera follows him through the exit of the covered structure, causing the scene to open up and expose the character to the elements. The environment then shifts to an elevated bridge overlooking a vast industrial harbor, where the sheltered lighting is replaced by a stormy night sky. Finally, the view expands to reveal large cranes, dock facilities, and the distant city skyline as the walkway continues across the open air.
